positive: A detailed, stylized portrait of a majestic arctic fox sitting amidst crystalline ice formations. The artwork should have a muted, cool color palette (icy blues, whites, slate grays) and an intricate, engraved etching style, giving it a scientific illustration feel. Focus on texture and detail.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, cartoon, bright colors, graffiti, messy, abstract
